mapper.insert: insert into platform_tools (id, tool_type, name, definition, created_at) values (#{id}, #{toolType}, #{name}, cast(#{definitionJson} as jsonb), now())
mapper.update: update platform_tools set tool_type = #{toolType}, name = #{name}, definition = cast(#{definitionJson} as jsonb) where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, tool_type, name, cast(definition as text) as definition_json, created_at from platform_tools where id = #{id}
select id, tool_type, name, cast(definition as text) as definition_json, created_at from platform_tools order by created_at desc

where.if: and ( name ilike concat('%', #{q}, '%') or id ilike concat('%', #{q}, '%') or tool_type ilike concat('%', #{q}, '%') or cast(definition as text) ilike concat('%', #{q}, '%') )

mapper.select:
select id, tool_type, name, cast(definition as text) as definition_json, created_at from platform_tools
order by created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
